name: zhihu-markdown-downloader
description: Build a Tampermonkey userscript that saves Zhihu answers and articles as Markdown folders or ZIP files.

scripts.check: node --check webpack.config.cjs && node --check src/shared/url.js && node --check src/save-core/constants.js && node --check src/save-core/dom.js && node --check src/save-core/utils.js && node --check src/save-core/target.js && node --check src/save-core/media.js && node --check src/save-core/markdown.js && node --check src/save-core/comments.js && node --check src/save-core/build-zip.js && node --check src/userscript/constants.js && node --check src/userscript/directory-save.js && node --check src/userscript/ui.js && node --check src/userscript/single-save.js && node --check src/userscript/comment-staging.js && node --check src/userscript/main.js && node --check src/batch/constants.js && node --check src/batch/time.js && node --check src/batch/client.js && node --check src/batch/config.mjs && node --check src/batch/browser-open.mjs && node --check src/batch/extract-zip.mjs && node --check src/batch/server.mjs && node --check src/batch/cli.mjs && node --check src/render/html-utils.mjs && node --check src/render/card-template.mjs && node --check src/render/template.mjs && node --check src/render/render.mjs && node --check src/render/cli.mjs && node --check src/render/index-page.mjs && node --check src/render/index-cli.mjs && node --check src/render/serve.mjs && node --check src/render/serve-cli.mjs && node --check userscripts/zhihu-markdown-saver.user.js && node --check test/check-build.mjs && node --check test/check-extract.mjs && node --check test/check-render.mjs && node --check test/check-render-index.mjs && node --check test/check-render-serve.mjs && node test/check-build.mjs && node test/check-extract.mjs && node test/check-render.mjs && node test/check-render-index.mjs && node test/check-render-serve.mjs
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run check
